summary: OSRM Directions API and Route Caching - All 9 tests passed. Verified OSRM Route API integration, directions caching, cache stats endpoint, and optimization endpoint.

tests.name: GET /api/directions returns source='osrm'
tests.detail: Returns source='osrm', distance=2851.9m, duration=344.1s, 13 steps with geometry (LineString)

tests.name: GET /api/directions with multiple waypoints
tests.detail: 4 waypoints returns 26 steps across 3 legs with human-readable instructions

tests.name: Step instructions are human-readable
tests.detail: Instructions contain direction words: 'Head onto', 'Turn left', 'Continue', etc.

tests.name: GET /api/cache/stats returns osrm_matrix and directions stats
tests.detail: osrm_matrix: {entries, maxsize=50, ttl_seconds=600, hits, misses, hit_rate}, directions: {entries, maxsize=200, ttl_seconds=30, hits, misses, hit_rate}

tests.name: Cache hit/miss counters increment correctly
tests.detail: First call: X-Cache=MISS, misses++. Second call: X-Cache=HIT, hits++. Verified via /api/cache/stats

tests.name: POST /api/optimize returns valid results
tests.detail: Returns 200 with algorithm, reasoning, total_distance_km, distance_source fields

tests.name: Cache key rounding absorbs GPS jitter
tests.detail: Coordinates differing in 5th decimal place return same cached result (4 decimal precision)

critical_code_review_comments: _maneuver_instruction() correctly generates human-readable instructions from OSRM maneuver type/modifier
_extract_steps() properly extracts steps from OSRM route legs with instruction, distance, duration, type, modifier, location, geometry
TTLCache for directions (30s TTL, 200 max) and osrm_matrix (600s TTL, 50 max) working correctly
Cache key rounding to 4 decimal places (~11m precision) absorbs GPS jitter effectively
X-Cache header correctly indicates HIT/MISS status
OSRM Route API is primary source, Mapbox is fallback (source field indicates which was used)
test_credentials: DEV_MODE=True uses dev-user-123, no credentials needed
seed_data_creation: None - used Queensland coordinates within OSRM data coverage
context_for_next_testing_agent: OSRM Directions API and caching are fully functional. OSRM runs on localhost:5000 with Queensland OSM data. The /api/directions endpoint returns source='osrm' with geometry, distance, duration, steps. Cache stats available at /api/cache/stats showing osrm_matrix and directions cache metrics. Cache hit/miss counters work correctly with X-Cache header.

key_findings.osrm_directions: Working - returns source='osrm' with full route data
key_findings.cache_stats: Both osrm_matrix and directions caches tracked with hits/misses/hit_rate
key_findings.cache_behavior: First call MISS, second call HIT with X-Cache header
key_findings.osrm_matrix_cache: TTL=600s (10 min), maxsize=50 for duration matrices

mocked_apis_list: Authentication is mocked via DEV_MODE env var (dev-user-123)
